title: Nature's Spirit - Create Recipe Compat
description: 【Discontinued】Adds recipe compatibility between Nature's Spirit and Create
body:
# **This datapack is discontinued.**
Please wait patiently for the official Create compat. 
## Description
This is a datapack that provides compatibilities between [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) by adding a series of recipes.
## Features
Currently this datapack only includes recipes for wood processing. ~~More recipes will be added in the future.~~ (never will😭)
